# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to **Split-Flap Card**.

Please keep examples, screenshots, and test data generic. Do not include private entity names, personal locations, API keys, tokens, secrets, or screenshots showing private spaces.

---

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

```text
Example:
Improves icon token alignment in compact split-flap rows.
```

---

## Type of change

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Visual editor improvement
- [ ] Theme/styling improvement
- [ ] Charset/language improvement
- [ ] Icon token improvement
- [ ] Animation improvement
- [ ] HACS/installation improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other

Link related issues if applicable.


## Testing

Describe how you tested the change.

- [ ] Tested static text
- [ ] Tested entity state
- [ ] Tested entity attribute
- [ ] Tested built-in clock
- [ ] Tested Swedish charset
- [ ] Tested weather charset with `°`

- [ ] Tested auto-paging
- [ ] Tested visual editor

## Example YAML

Add a minimal generic YAML example if relevant.

```yaml
type: custom:split-flap-card
source: text
text: CENTRAL STATION
segments: 16
theme: kiosk_gold
```

Attach screenshots or video if useful.

- [ ] No personal names are visible
- [ ] No addresses are visible

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or secrets are visible

Check all that apply:

- [ ] This change is backwards-compatible

- [ ] This change changes existing behavior

- [ ] Migration notes are included if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] The card loads in Home Assistant
- [ ] No browser console errors are present
- [ ] Public examples are generic
- [ ] No private or sensitive data is included
- [ ] Existing examples still work
- [ ] New options are documented
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated if needed
- [ ] HACS validation passes if applicable
